name: Pepper Jelly
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the ground bell peppers and hot peppers in a pot.
2. Add white vinegar and sugar, stirring until well combined.
3. Bring the mixture to a rolling boil over high heat for 5 minutes, stirring constantly.
4. Stir in liquid fruit pectin and a few drops of green food coloring.
5. Return to a boil and maintain a hard boil for an additional 2 minutes.
6. Remove from heat and carefully ladle into hot, sterilized jars, leaving some headspace.
7. Seal the jars with paraffin wax or paraffin-based sealing compound.
NOTE: For an even spicier version, add a few drops of hot pepper sauce during cooking before achieving a rolling boil.
